topic: House party breakdown as of mid-2025
summary: House press gallery shows 220R-212D-3 vacancies (as of May 2025). Three Dem deaths: Turner (TX), Grijalva (AZ), Connolly (VA). Republicans gained seats from initial 218-215 margin through special elections.
content: The 119th Congress started with narrow R majority. By May 2025, multiple Democratic members died creating vacancies. Republicans appear to have strengthened their majority to 220-212 through special elections. The underlying question asks if Democrats could ever have MORE seats than Republicans before Jan 3, 2027 - this appears very unlikely given the current 8-seat deficit (not counting vacancies).
